user.title: Set up Wallet Auto-Pay
user.description: Select the device running the Home Assistant Companion App and provide the card details. When you click 'Pay Now', your banking app will open pre-filled.

data.todo_only: ToDo only (App has no support for image sharing)

notify.todo_only_message: Wallet: {amount}€ for {merchant}. Added to To-Do list for manual processing.
notify.payment_notification_message: Wallet: {amount}€ at {merchant}. Open banking app with QR code?
notify.no_items_to_pay: No items in To-Do list to pay.

pay_next_item.name: Pay next item
pay_next_item.description: Shows the QR code for the next item in the To-Do list and marks it as completed.

trigger_payment_notification.name: Trigger payment notification
trigger_payment_notification.description: Manually sends the full interactive payment notification (QR code + buttons) to the mobile device.
